sentences.target: Il est âgé de quatre-vingts ans.
sentences.reading: /il ɛ taʒe də katʁə vɛ̃z ɑ̃/

translations.fr: Il est âgé de quatre-vingts ans.
translations.ipa: /il ɛ taʒe də katʁə vɛ̃z ɑ̃/

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (present, 3sg) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective agreeing with the subject; part of the idiomatic measure construction être âgé de X.
Preposition introducing the measure complement (de + numeral + noun).
Compound numeral meaning 80; final -s appears because it is not followed by another numeral.
Common noun (plural) denoting years; head of the measure NP governed by de.

sentences.target: Un homme âgé attend le bus.

translations.fr: Un homme âgé attend le bus.
translations.en: An elderly man is waiting for the bus.
translations.es: Un hombre mayor está esperando el autobús.
translations.de: Ein älterer Mann wartet auf den Bus.
translations.it: Un uomo anziano sta aspettando l'autobus.
translations.zh-Hans: 一位老人正在等公交车。
translations.pt: Um homem idoso está esperando o ônibus.
translations.vi: Một người đàn ông lớn tuổi đang đợi xe buýt.
translations.nl: Een oudere man wacht op de bus.
translations.hu: Egy idős férfi a buszra vár.
translations.hi: एक बुज़ुर्ग आदमी बस का इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ένας ηλικιωμένος άντρας περιμένει το λεωφορείο.
translations.nb: En eldre mann venter på bussen.
translations.id: Seorang pria lanjut usia sedang menunggu bus.
translations.sv: En äldre man väntar på bussen.
translations.ro: Un bărbat în vârstă așteaptă autobuzul.
translations.da: En ældre mand venter på bussen.
translations.ja: 年配の男性がバスを待っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of homme.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, post-nominal; modifies homme.
Main lexical verb (present, 3sg); transitive verb taking a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of bus.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of attend.

sentences.target: Ma mère s'occupe d'un voisin âgé.

translations.fr: Ma mère s'occupe d'un voisin âgé.
translations.en: My mom is taking care of an elderly neighbor.
translations.es: Mi madre está cuidando a un vecino mayor.
translations.de: Meine Mutter kümmert sich um einen älteren Nachbarn.
translations.it: Mia madre si prende cura di un vicino anziano.
translations.ko: 우리 엄마가 나이가 든 이웃을 돌보고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妈妈在照顾一位年长的邻居。
translations.yue: 我媽喺照顧一位年長嘅鄰居。
translations.ru: Моя мама заботится о пожилом соседе.
translations.pt: Minha mãe está cuidando de um vizinho idoso.
translations.vi: Mẹ tôi đang chăm sóc một người hàng xóm lớn tuổi.
translations.nl: Mijn moeder zorgt voor een oudere buurman.
translations.uk: Моя мама доглядає за літнім сусідом.
translations.hi: मेरी माँ एक बुज़ुर्ग पड़ोसी की देखभाल कर रही है.
translations.pl: Moja mama opiekuje się starszym sąsiadem.
translations.el: Η μητέρα μου φροντίζει έναν ηλικιωμένο γείτονα.
translations.nb: Moren min tar seg av en eldre nabo.
translations.id: Ibu saya sedang merawat seorang tetangga lanjut usia.
translations.sv: Min mamma tar hand om en äldre granne.
translations.ro: Mama mea are grijă de un vecin în vârstă.
translations.cs: Moje máma se stará o staršího souseda.
translations.da: Min mor tager sig af en ældre nabo.
translations.ja: 母は年配の隣人の世話をしている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular form; determiner of mère.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Clitic reflexive pronoun elided before vowel; coreferential with the subject in the pronominal verb construction s'occuper de.
Main verb (present, 3sg) in pronominal use s'occuper (‘to take care’), selecting a de-PP complement.
Preposition de elided before vowel; introduces the oblique complement of s'occuper.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of voisin.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition de.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies voisin.

sentences.target: Vous voyez ce monsieur âgé là-bas.

translations.fr: Vous voyez ce monsieur âgé là-bas.
translations.en: You see that elderly gentleman over there.
translations.es: Ves a ese señor mayor de allí.
translations.de: Sie sehen den älteren Herrn dort drüben.
translations.zh-Hans: 你看到那边那位年长的先生。
translations.yue: 你見到嗰邊嗰位老先生。
translations.ru: Вы видите вон того пожилого господина.
translations.pt: Você vê aquele senhor idoso ali.
translations.he: אתה רואה את האדון המבוגר שם.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy người đàn ông lớn tuổi kia.
translations.ar: أنت ترى ذلك الرجل المسن هناك.
translations.nl: Je ziet die oudere heer daar.
translations.uk: Ви бачите того літнього чоловіка там.
translations.hu: Látod azt az idős urat ott.
translations.hi: तुम वहाँ उस बुज़ुर्ग व्यक्ति को देखते हो.
translations.el: Βλέπεις εκείνον τον ηλικιωμένο κύριο εκεί πέρα.
translations.nb: Du ser den eldre herren der borte.
translations.id: Kamu melihat pria lanjut usia itu di sana.
translations.sv: Du ser den äldre herren där borta.
translations.ro: Îl vezi pe domnul în vârstă acolo.
translations.da: Du ser den ældre herre derovre.
translations.ja: あそこにいるあの年配の紳士が見えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person plural (also used as polite singular); subject of the clause.
Main verb (present, 2pl); takes a direct object NP.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determiner of monsieur.
Common noun (title/noun), masculine singular; head of the object NP.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies monsieur.
Deictic locative adverb; indicates the location of the referent.
